summary: File manager / toolbar UI project. Currently on v0.4.143 (restored). Working on toolbar button styling and version bumps.
architectural_notes: Toolbar buttons [2], [3], [4] use light blue (#eff6ff) and light yellow (#fefce8) backgrounds respectively, with no border color styling

existing_features.title: Update the application version string in frontend/src/lib/appVersion.ts from '0.4.143' to '0.4.147'.

new_feature_requests.summary: In the toolbar div of FileList.tsx, apply styling changes to exactly three buttons identified by XPath positions button[2], button[3], and button[4] within the toolbar's button group div: (1) Remove any border color styling from all three buttons. (2) button[2] (the File upload button): set background color to '#eff6ff' (very light blue). (3) button[3] and button[4] (the Folder-related buttons): set background color to '#fefce8' (very light yellow). No other buttons, components, styles, or logic may be changed.
